assertions.description: When no dashboards are affected by the PR, no screenshot is taken
assertions.evidence: No screenshot files were created. Agent correctly identified that only .ts files were modified.

assertions.description: Agent reports that no dashboards were affected
assertions.evidence: Agent output included a message indicating no dashboard JSON files were in the diff.

assertions.description: No git commit was created for screenshots
assertions.evidence: No new commits related to screenshots in git log.
